response.original_title: 他人を見下す高飛車バリキャリOLも虜にする 女性専用強制開発M性感エステレズ 西野絵美 水川潤
response.overview: Emi is an office lady who, thanks to her overwhelming work ability and pride, has risen to the top and become an executive at an IT company. Tired of constantly scolding her incompetent subordinates, she stumbles across an advertisement for a beauty salon and, out of curiosity, books a massage. What awaits her is more than just a simple massage: provocation, massages in intimate areas, and pleasurable torture. The haughty woman who only knew work trembles with her first sensations of pleasure, and after just one visit to the lesbian beauty salon, she awakens to feminine pleasure... Emi Nishino's Lesbian Debut! Emi Nishino and Jun Mizukawa create the ultimate forced lesbian development experience through erotic massage!
